data.title: Cordless Freedom Meets Corded Power: Wahl® Launches the Cordless LI+ Deluxe Chrome Pro® Haircutting Kit
data.description: Wahl®, the trusted brand by professionals since 1919, has introduced a modern upgrade to its iconic grooming tool. The new model is equipped with Lithium-ion power, ensuring long runtime and powerful performance. Based in STERLING, Ill., the company aims to provide quality haircutting experience for home users with this latest launch in March 25, 2026.

data.title: Professional Pitcher Anthony Eyanson Partners with National Eating Disorders Association to Turn Strikeouts Into Donations
data.description: A partnership has been formed between professional pitcher Anthony Eyanson and the National Eating Disorders Association in Brooklyn, NY. Eyanson will be turning his strikeouts into donations for the organization.

data.title: Adaptive IT Workforce Takes Center Stage at Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in Las Vegas as AI Value Hinges on Workforce Readiness
data.description: As AI projects grow in the corporate world, businesses are feeling the heat to turn their investments into tangible results. However, there is a growing concern that workforce preparedness is not keeping up with the rapid advancements in technology. This issue will be a focal point at Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in Las Vegas on June 9.

data.title: NVIDIA, Google and Oracle Take Center Stage at Data Center World 2026 as AI Drives Unprecedented Infrastructure and Power Demands
data.description: In Washington, Data Center World revealed its keynote lineup for the upcoming event. The presentations will include insights from prominent figures in the industry such as Google, NVIDIA, and Oracle. They will tackle key challenges like scaling AI infrastructure, ensuring power security, and reshaping data center strategies amidst the AI era. The program for the 2026 event aims to showcase the remarkable industry evolution underway.

data.title: Keysight Unveils Next-Generation In-Vehicle Network Test Solutions at Automotive Ethernet Congress 2026
data.description: Santa Rosa, California - A recent development has advanced the testing of mission-critical receivers to ensure the reliability and safety of upcoming in-vehicle networks. This initiative aims to enhance the effectiveness of receiver testing to meet the demands of future automotive technologies.

The disruption is three times that of 1973 in seaborne shipments. Oil went from $5 to $30 then. This time, from $60 to $100. Same volume shock, fraction of the price response. The world is far more elastic than it was fifty years ago.

data.title: Boise Hunter Homes Leads Luxury Treasure Valley Home Sales in 2025
data.description: In 2025, Boise Hunter Homes secured a dominating 26% share of new-construction home sales in the Treasure Valley area, establishing a significant presence in Idaho's luxury housing market valued at $1 million and above.

data.title: Pepper Acquires YC-Backed Alima, Doubling Down on AI and Product Content Capabilities
data.description: In New York, Pepper, a prominent technology partner for food distributors, has confirmed the acquisition of Alima, a startup supported by Y Combinator. Alima is dedicated to revamping food distribution for small distributors. The acquisition signifies a joint goal to develop a platform essential for distributors to manage all primary operations. The founders of Alima are now part of the Pepper team, working collaboratively. Former Alima CEO and co-founder Jorge Vizcayno will spearhead initiatives within Pepper going forward.

data.title: Weave Bio Establishes Inaugural Strategic Advisory Board to Shape the Future of AI-Driven Regulatory Science
data.description: Weave Bio, a prominent company specializing in AI-native regulatory automation, has disclosed the establishment of its initial Strategic Advisory Board (SAB) in San Francisco. The SAB features seasoned executives and experts with diverse backgrounds in pharmaceutical regulatory strategy, health authority policies, capital markets, and academic research. This board aims to provide strategic counsel for the development of the Weave Platform and promote the ethical integration of AI in pharmaceuticals. This move showcases the company's commitment to innovation and responsible technological advancement.

data.title: Brightseed Launches the World’s First Clinically-Validated, Enterprise AI Platform, Built on Over a Decade of Scientific Research
data.description: Brightseed, Inc., a company based in South San Francisco, has introduced its latest innovation platform. This platform is the first of its kind in the field, utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) to drive advancements in the health sciences industry. The aim is to enhance the chances of success in commercial endeavors within health and life sciences. This move signifies a shift for Brightseed from a bioactives discovery company to an enterprise AI entity focused on providing data-as-a-service (DaaS) globally.

data.title: Wake Up, Tenno – Warframe Launches Free for Nintendo Switch™ 2 Alongside The Shadowgrapher Update
data.description: In London, Ontario, Digital Extremes has released their popular sci-fi game Warframe for Nintendo Switch™ 2. This launch coincides with the highly anticipated update, The Shadowgrapher, which is available for free on all platforms starting today. The game is celebrating a milestone of 13 years and boasts a global community of over 85 million players. Players on the new Nintendo Switch™ 2 can delve into the immersive world of Warframe with enhanced FPS, resolution, and quicker load times, ensuring both new and experienced players have a seamless experience.

data.title: Esports Nations Cup 2026 Awards Official Partner Status Across 100+ Nations to Build the Future of Nation-Based Esports
data.description: A recent global initiative aims to bring together federations, clubs, and ecosystem leaders to create national teams and engage local communities in fostering increased representation on a worldwide platform. The announcement campaign for ENC National Team Partners was launched in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on March 25, 2026. The framework seeks to mobilize support and collaboration, emphasizing the importance of unity in promoting participation in global events.

data.title: Enact Releases 2025 Sustainability Report
data.description: Enact Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACT) based in Raleigh, North Carolina, disclosed on March 25, 2026, the launch of its 2025 Sustainability Report, which details the company's initiatives and performance throughout the year 2025. This report offers a comprehensive overview of Enact's sustainability efforts and achievements during the specified period. The disclosure of this information is crucial for stakeholders to gauge the company's commitment to environmental and social responsibility.
